channel.title: The Grant Desk - AI & Safety, EU, next 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: AI & Safety, EU, next 30 days.

item.title: Artist-in-Residence: Reimagining AI at the EU Policy Lab - €15,000 - deadline 22 May 2026
item.description:
Joint Research Centre, European Commission

Location: Brussels, Belgium (with possible site visit in Ispra, Italy)

Award: €15,000

Duration: 6 months

Deadline: 22 May 2026

Open call for an artist residency reimagining AI at the EU Policy Lab. The 15,000 EUR contracted budget covers expert fees, allowance, accommodation and travel during on-site work.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
